title: Green Hydrogen Projects Fuelled by Nova Scotiaâ€™s Clean Fuels Fund
content:
The Nova Scotia government is supporting several green hydrogen projects in the second round of funding from the Clean Fuels Fund. In all, seven projects involving clean fuels innovation were provided a total of $3 million.

â€œNova Scotia is seizing the tremendous opportunities we have to develop and use low-carbon and renewable fuels to power our industries and businesses,â€ said Nova Scotia Energy Minister Trevor Boudreau. â€œThrough the Clean Fuels Fund, we are providing a financial boost to innovators who want to put these fuels to work and help grow our green economy.â€
author: Analysts Account
